description: Accepted review baseline for agent_tasks. Only review-level findings may be accepted; todo/error findings remain blocking.

accepted_reviews.title: ABS DeleteUser is high risk and should remain guarded, audited, and documented.
accepted_reviews.reason: lifecycle background deletion path; ABS delete failure preserves local record, ABS missing is recorded, and local physical delete plus system AuditLog are committed in one transaction
